## Checklist

- [ ] All reference files are consumed by an explicit Read step (not just mentioned in prose)
- [ ] No proprietary frameworks — all content uses published, attributed sources
- [ ] No clinical language (disorder, diagnosis, pathological framing, etc.)
- [ ] Tested the affected skill by running it end-to-end
- [ ] Skills resolve `kb_path` independently (Step 0: Load Config)
- [ ] File paths used in skills match actual file locations
